name: tsss-unified
description: Teacher School Swapping System - Unified Development Environment

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen" "npm run dev --prefix Backend" "npm run dev --prefix tsss-frontend-main"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix tsss-frontend-main
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix Backend && npm run lint --prefix tsss-frontend-main

author: Antigravity
